_design: Layer 13 — Turn-level interaction nodes. One record per substantive agent<->user turn. ZERO compression: preserved_full_text field carries the literal conversational quote. Linked via domain, objects, claims, rules, KUs, incidents. Session-level retros are DERIVED from this layer; this layer is the source of truth for reasoning paths. Established Session #059.

_schema.domain_field: 3-axis {functional: [...], module: [...], process: [...]} — at least one required

interactions.summary: User reframes project north-star: SAP Agentic AGI. Directs that all design decisions be evaluated against whether they advance AGI properties vs local optimization.

evidence.cite: remember the aim of this project be the SAP agentic AGI

interactions.preserved_full_text: remember the aim of this project be the SAP agentic AGI

interactions.summary: User rules that knowledge cannot be compressed or lost; every interaction must be efficiently related and create more knowledge. Anchors CP-002 at interaction granularity.

evidence.cite: we can not compress or lose knowledge we need to eficienlty relate every interaction and create more knowledge

interactions.preserved_full_text: Explain the change please. and remember that we can not compress or lose knowledge we need to eficienlty relate every interaction and create more knowledge.

interactions.summary: User directs that every topic must be assignable to a domain (and multiple axes); domains are the substrate for IMPROVING and USING knowledge. Triggered creation of Layer 14 domains.json with 3-axis taxonomy (functional/module/process).

evidence.cite: Every topic can be assigned to a domain and improve the knowledge or use the knowledge

interactions.preserved_full_text: and the Domains. Every topic can be assigned to a domain and improve the knowledge or use the knowledge

interactions.summary: User contributes knowledge about Maputo MZN field office: (1) yesterday (2026-04-20) a process executed by Maputo Field Office exposed a dashboard and custom BDC clearing workflow; (2) TWO operational tiers exist — CENTRAL process by UNES accounts + FIELD-OFFICE processes within UNES accounts; (3) field offices run a 'strange' custom reconciliation/clearing via batch input that MAY duplicate standard clearing — open question why custom programs are needed.

evidence.cite: Filed Office Maputo MZN that provide as with a knowledge about a dashboard and transaction done by them to control opereations
CONSTANTS: GC_MOD TYPE C VALUE 'E' — root cause of TIME_OUT on slow WAN

This will be clearly indentified in our knowledges and Brain. There is main Central process By unes accounts and there are other process managed by Filed offices by acocunts inside unes. That run and strange process to reconciaate accounts and Clearing using a batch input. This maybe acan be run for the standard Clearing programs> not sure why we need this Custom progra.s as we sow in maputo MZN issue. Topic to discover
